codeReview.summary: ProductForm component implemented correctly with all 6 required fields (name, description, price, category, condition, image_url), Effect.ts validation via ProductSchema, inline validation errors with red borders, and onSubmit callback. No blocking issues found.

issues.description: Textarea base classes use hardcoded string instead of cn() helper, inconsistent with other fields. Classes are static so cn() not needed, but for consistency with codebase patterns this could be updated.

validateField function accepts _value parameter but doesn't use it - validates entire form state instead. This is actually correct behavior but parameter name prefixed with underscore to indicate unused.

summary: Implementation is complete and correct. All feature requirements met: (1) form displays all product fields with appropriate inputs, (2) validation runs on blur or submit using Effect.ts ProductSchema, (3) invalid fields show red border and error message, (4) valid form submission calls onSubmit callback with ProductInput type. Worker followed frontend-worker skill procedure correctly and passed all quality checks (TypeScript, Biome lint).
